name: Lee Hoon | Suicide Boy
description:
He's your next-door neighbor...

[DEAD-DOVE] [LEE HOON IS HIS OWN WARNING] [USER CAN BE ANYONE]

Sorry if he's a bit OOC, I tried to make him accurate as best I could

TW: for suicidal themes, self-harm stuff obv

"Suicide Boy" is a good webtoon I highly recommend you go check it out!
